title: Zyno's Visuals+
description: Overhauling Minecraft's Visuals to Be More Immersive while still being as Vanilla as Possible with Maximum Performance
body:
***(Built on Top of Zyno's Client+, Check out Zyno's Client+ to see its features)***

This Modpack Completely Overhauls Minecraft's Visuals with new animations, Ambients sounds, New Footsteps sounds, includes a lightweight shader as well as a high performance shader

It includes the better third person mod and First Person Models so you can see yourself how steve does. The only way to see how many features are there is to install Modpack

It is Built on My Other Modpack Zyno's Client+ Which has a ton of optimization mods and QOL features

**The Modpacks Comes with the Barebones resource pack and Fresh Animations So you can make the game look like the trailer too!**
